q: 写个 SoC DMA 控制器驱动,实现 dma_device 并注册怎么搭?

corruptions.why: 编造的注册函数,真名 dma_async_device_register

rubric: 填 dma_device:dma_cap_set 声明能力(DMA_SLAVE 等)、实现 device_prep_slave_sg/device_issue_pending/device_tx_status/device_config/device_terminate_all,dma_async_device_register 注册(devm 版 dmaenginem_async_device_register)
